headline: Is Williams-Sonoma Stock Outperforming the Dow?
summary: As Williams-Sonoma has underperformed the Dow recently, analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: POTTERY BARN KIDS AND POTTERY BARN TEEN LAUNCH EXCLUSIVE COLLABORATION WITH HILL HOUSE HOME
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 24, 2026--Pottery Barn Kids and Pottery Barn Teen, portfolio brands of Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM), the world’s largest digital-first, design-led and sustainable home retailer, announced today a new collaboration with Hill House Home, the fashion and lifestyle brand known for its feminine style and signature prints.
